steps.title: Use the equal legs
steps.content: The figure shows a right triangle with two congruent legs, each of length $32$. A right triangle with congruent legs has two congruent acute angles.

steps.title: Split the remaining angle
steps.content:
The right angle measures $90^{\circ}$, leaving $90^{\circ}$ for the two congruent acute angles.
$$2x=90$$
$$x=45$$
The answer is 45.
